name: Overlay Sentinel
name_jp: オーバーレイ・スナイパー
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. When this card is Normal Summoned: Change this card to Defense Position. If you control a face-up Xyz Monster that has Xyz Material: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; it loses 500 ATK for each Xyz Material attached to a monster you control.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. When this card is Normal Summoned: Change this card to Defense Position. If you control a face-up Xyz Monster that has Xyz Material: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; it loses 500 ATK for each Xyz Material attached to a monster you control.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. When this card is Normal Summoned: Change this card to Defense Position. If you control a face-up Xyz Monster that has Xyz Material: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; it loses 500 ATK for each Xyz Material attached to a monster you control.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
